settings.heading: Wireless Remote Control

settings.text: Our automatic TV bed elevates the seating level when watching some of the biggest screens on TV today, all through a wireless remote-control system. It’s super easy! Just select either a king-size or double bed option and personalise your viewing experience the way you want it to be. To preserve your taste, the TV Bed Frame will complement both the stylishness and relaxation of your bedroom.

settings.heading: Install Your Own TV

settings.text:
Our versatile TV bed allows you to integrate a maximum size of 47 inches TV into your bedroom. By doing so, you will personalise an entertainment space where everything suits you. The TV bed
frame enables one to comfortably fit the selected size of television into the elegant design of the bed containing the same device—providing both style and practicality in one luxurious package.

settings.heading: Various Size Options

settings.text: Our TV bed frame is available in a range of sizes to suit every bedroom. Choose from the classic 4'6" Double bed, perfect for smaller rooms or couples, the spacious 5ft King size for extra comfort, or go all out with the 6ft Super King size for the ultimate luxury sleeping experience. No matter which size you pick, each frame is designed with style, practicality, and comfort in mind.

settings.heading: Storage Space

settings.text: Maximise your bedroom's functionality with our TV bed, featuring ample storage space to keep your belongings neatly organised and out of sight. Enjoy the perfect blend of comfort and style with our premium King Size TV bed. Transform your bedroom today with our double TV bed with storage. It comes with metal gas lift base storage options.

Express Delivery

Need your new bed in a hurry? Choose our Express Delivery option at checkout and enjoy faster delivery within just 3 to 5 working days. Fast, reliable, and stress-free so you can enjoy your new bed sooner than you think.

5 Year Warranty

At Bedroomking, we stand behind the quality and craftsmanship of our divan bed frames and mattresses. We offer a 5 year warranty to ensure your satisfaction and peace of mind. This warranty covers any defects in materials or workmanship present at the time of your TV storage bed purchase. If your bed frame or bed exhibits issues like broken slats, malfunctioning pistons in lift ottomans, or faulty welds within the warranty period, we'll repair or replace the defective parts at our discretion.

settings.testimonial:
Our TV bed has transformed family movie nights!
The kids love it, and we appreciate the quality family time it brings. The bed itself is comfortable, and the TV adds a unique touch to our bedroom. It's a hit in our household, and we highly recommend it to other families.
settings.author: Lisa Johnson

settings.testimonial: I absolutely love my TV bed! The integrated TV system works like a charm, and the convenience of having it right there in the footboard is fantastic. The bed is not only stylish but also very comfortable. The whole setup has exceeded my expectations!
settings.author: Michael Chen

settings.testimonial: From the moment we received our TV bed, it felt like a slice of luxury in our bedroom. The TV integration is seamless, and the quality of the materials is top-notch. Every night feels like a trip to a high-end hotel. Couldn't be happier with our purchase!"
settings.author: Shen Anna

settings.heading: Customer Reviews
YOU MAY ALSO LIKE
What is a TV Bed?
settings.text: A TV bed is a bed that has the capacity built into the frame to house your television. The TV can be hidden away in the foot of the bed, and then exposed at the touch of a button, which is perfect for decluttering your bedroom and helps you to maximize the space available

settings.heading: Is buying a TV bed a good idea?
settings.text:
TV beds bring together cutting
edge technology, convenience, and luxury for an outstanding experience.

settings.heading: What are the benefits of buying a TV Bed?
settings.text:
• Convenience: Enjoy shows and movies from the comfort of your bed without needing a separate TV stand.
  • Space-saving: Eliminates the need for a separate TV stand, potentially freeing up floor space in smaller bedrooms.
  • Storage: Some TV beds offer built-in storage for DVDs, games, or other bedroom essentials.
  • Style: Can add a modern and sleek look to your bedroom.

settings.heading: What sizes are TV beds available in?
settings.text:
• 4'6 Double TV Beds: A 4'6" double TV bed is a great space-saving option for smaller bedrooms that combines the functionality of a bed with a built-in TV stand.
  • 5ft King size TV Beds: King size TV beds are a luxurious option that combines the comfort of a king size bed with the convenience of a built-in TV stand.
  • 6ft Super King TV Beds: Super King TV beds offer the unparalleled comfort of a super king mattress alongside the built-in convenience of a TV stand.

settings.heading: How do TV beds plug in?
settings.text: All of the internal wires and leads are hidden inside the bed frame. To plug your TV bed into the mains, an extension lead may be required to reach the television plug beneath the bed, depending on how far away your plug socket is. Our beds come with a UK 3 pin plug fitting.

settings.heading: Is a TV included in every TV Bed?
settings.text: No, a TV is not included in our TV Bed. However, you have the flexibility to integrate your own TV, and our TV Beds support screens up to 47 inches. This allows you to personalize your entertainment experience and choose a TV that suits your preferences.

settings.heading: Will you install and deliver my TV Bed for me?
settings.text: Absolutely! Our delivery team ensures your TV Bed is delivered directly to your room of choice. For added convenience, installation services are available across the UK at a small additional charge. We strive to make the entire process seamless, providing you with a hassle-free experience.

settings.heading: Can I use my existing plasma or LED TV with a new TV Bed?
settings.text: Absolutely! Our TV Beds are designed to accommodate your existing plasma or LED TV, up to 47 inches in size. This feature allows you to seamlessly integrate your current entertainment setup with the new TV Bed, providing you with continuity and flexibility.

settings.heading: Do you sell TV Beds with under bed storage?
settings.text: Yes, we have an extensive range of TV Beds that not only offer the luxury of entertainment but also come with full under bed storage. This clever design maximizes the functionality of your bedroom, providing ample space to keep your belongings neatly organized and out of sight.

settings.heading: This is quite a big purchase — can I spread the costs?
settings.text: Yes, we understand that purchasing a TV Bed is a significant investment. To make it more accessible, we offer a range of interest-free options. You have the flexibility to spread the cost of your purchase, ensuring that you can enjoy the luxury and comfort of our TV Beds without financial strain.

settings.heading: Is assembly difficult for TV beds?
settings.text:
No, TV beds typically come with clear assembly instructions, and assembly is manageable with basic tools. Some models
may also feature easy-to-assemble designs. We also provide an assembly option
for some little added charges.

settings.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
